zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Pakenham於從1330年到1346年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷時，她的父親Simon Pakenham40歲，母親Agnes Hull36歲。她於1352年與John de Villiers IV在英國萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Pakenham于从1330年到1346年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷时，她的父亲Simon Pakenham40岁，母亲Agnes Hull36岁。她于1352年与John de Villiers IV在英国萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Pakenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pakenham (Suffolk). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Pacca (genitive Paccan) + hām ‘village, homestead’.
History: A family of this name has been established in Westmeath, Ireland, since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Pakenham was born from 1330 to 1346, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, her father, Simon Pakenham, was 40 and her mother, Agnes Hull, was 36. She married John de Villiers IV in 1352, in Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Pakenham est née du 1330 au 1346, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Simon Pakenham, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnes Hull, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John de Villiers IV en 1352, à Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Pakenham von 1330 bis 1346 in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon Pakenham 40 und ihre Mutter Agnes Hull 36. Sie hat 1352 in Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England John de Villiers IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Pakenham è nata il da 1330 a 1346 nel Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Simon Pakenham, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Agnes Hull, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John de Villiers IV nel 1352, nel Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Pakenhamがから1330年まで1346年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで生まれた時，父Simon Pakenhamは40歳，母Agnes Hullは36歳であった。1352年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルクビー マロリーでJohn de Villiers IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Pakenham(이)가 1330년 부터 1346년 까지 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon Pakenham(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Hull(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1352년 영국 레이스스터실르 커k비 맬로리에서 John de Villiers IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Pakenham nasceu de 1330 a 1346, em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon Pakenham, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Hull, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Villiers IV em 1352, em Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Pakenham родилась с 1330 по 1346 в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Simon Pakenham было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Hull, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Villiers IV в 1352 г. в местности киркби маллори, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Pakenham nació desde 1330 hasta 1346, en Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon Pakenham, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnes Hull, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John de Villiers IV en 1352, en Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
